name: api
description: API project for generating OpenAPI specifications and code for multiple services

scripts.specs:generate: rm -rf specs/ && tsp compile . --output-dir output/ && mv output/@typespec/openapi3 specs/ && rm -rf output/
scripts.api:generate: pnpm run api-client:generate && pnpm run api-server:generate
scripts.api-client:generate: pnpm run api-client-courses:generate && pnpm run api-client-module2:generate && pnpm run api-client-module3:generate
scripts.api-server:generate: pnpm run api-server-courses:generate && pnpm run api-server-module2:generate && pnpm run api-server-module3:generate
scripts.generate: pnpm run specs:generate && pnpm run api:generate

author: worksounourmachine
